questions.text: How likely are you to switch your main mobile operator in the next 6 months?
questions.rationale: Measures churn intent directly, a core indicator missing from the current ad-focused questions.

questions.text: Which operator would you most likely move to if you decided to switch?
questions.rationale: Identifies competitive pull and whether Etisalat is a net gainer or loser in switching consideration.

questions.text: In your own words, what would make you switch to or stay with Etisalat?
questions.rationale: Captures unprompted switching triggers and loyalty drivers that closed questions can't surface.
